gdpr_banner: This website does not use cookies. We only save your progress locally on your device. No personal data is collected or shared.
privacy_text: We do not collect, store, or transmit any personal data to any server. All progress is saved only in your browser's local storage. No cookies are used.
complete_all_sections_first: Please complete all sections before generating PDF.
pdf_thankyou: Thank you for using our guided planning tool.
exec_summary_purpose_q: Which statement BEST captures the primary purpose of your executive summary?
concise_overview: A concise, compelling overview that enables investors to quickly grasp your business opportunity without reading the entire document
technical_analysis: A detailed technical analysis of your financial projections
career_history: A comprehensive history of your personal career achievements
legal_disclaimer: A legal disclaimer protecting your intellectual property
exec_summary_elements_q: Which FIVE elements should your executive summary include? (Select all that apply)
scope_market: The scope of your business and potential market size
value_proposition: Your value proposition (what makes you different)
strengths_weaknesses: Strengths and weaknesses of the project
exec_summary_text_q: Draft your executive summary (200-300 words) addressing: business opportunity, proposed solution, target market, key resources, timeline, expected returns.
mission_vision_distinction_q: Which correctly distinguishes between mission and vision statements?
mission_purpose_vision_future: Mission clarifies purpose and reason for existence (what you do now); vision describes how the organization sees itself in the future (where you're going)
mission_financial_vision_marketing: Mission describes financial goals; vision describes marketing strategies
mission_internal_vision_external: Mission is for internal use only; vision is for external investors
mission_annual_vision_static: Mission changes annually; vision remains static forever
vision_characteristic_q: Which characteristic should a vision statement possess?
concise_appealing: Concise, appealing to stakeholders, consistent with mission and values, practical, motivating, and verifiable
product_list: List all products and services in detail
mission_statement_q: Draft your mission statement (2-3 sentences): purpose, markets served, products/services provided.
vision_statement_q: Draft your vision statement (1-2 sentences): where will your organization be in 5-10 years?
core_values_q: List 5-7 core values that will guide your organization (e.g., responsibility, ethics, customer orientation, passion, competence, human development).
objectives_false_q: Which statement about organizational objectives is FALSE?
only_financial: Objectives should only focus on financial outcomes
quantitative_qualitative: Objectives can be quantitative or qualitative
measurable_actions: Objectives should be defined by management and translated into measurable actions
evaluated_compliance: Objectives should be evaluated for compliance against stipulated targets
financial_objective_q: Financial perspective objective (e.g., 'Recover investment by end of year 3')
customer_objective_q: Customer perspective objective (e.g., 'Achieve 15% occupancy rate in first year')
pestel_factors_q: The PESTEL framework analyzes which environmental contexts? (Select all that apply)
pestel_political_q: Political-Legal factor to analyze for your business
legislation_q: Which legislation applies to your industry? List all relevant laws, regulations, licensing requirements, and permits.
porter_horizontal_q: Which forces are classified as HORIZONTAL competitive forces? (Select all that apply)
supplier_power_q: Supplier bargaining power rating (1-5) and justification
customer_power_q: Customer bargaining power rating (1-5) and justification
new_entrants_q: Threat of new entrants rating (1-5) and justification
substitutes_q: Threat of substitutes rating (1-5) and justification
average_intensity_q: Average intensity score and industry attractiveness
swot_quadrants_q: In a dynamic SWOT matrix, which combination correctly matches the quadrants?
swot_bets_q: APOSTAS (BETS): How will you use strengths to exploit opportunities?
swot_warnings_q: AVISOS (WARNINGS): How will you use strengths to mitigate threats?
swot_restrictions_q: RESTRIÇÕES (RESTRICTIONS): How will you improve weaknesses to capture opportunities?
swot_risks_q: RISCOS (RISKS): How will you address weaknesses that amplify threats?
bmc_not_area_q: Which is NOT one of the four main areas of the Business Model Canvas?
bmc_segments_q: Customer Segments (who are your direct AND indirect customers?)
bmc_value_q: Value Proposition (why will customers choose YOU?)
bmc_relationships_q: Customer Relationships (how will you interact with customers?)
bmc_revenue_q: Revenue Streams (how will you make money?)
bmc_resources_q: Key Resources (what critical assets do you need?)
bmc_activities_q: Key Activities (what must you do daily/weekly?)
bmc_partnerships_q: Key Partnerships (who will help you succeed?)
bmc_costs_q: Cost Structure (what are your major expenses?)
marketing_mix_elements_q: For service businesses, the extended Marketing Mix includes which SEVEN elements?
product_desc_q: Product/Service: What specific service are you offering? Features and benefits?
price_desc_q: Price: What is your pricing strategy? Differentiated pricing?
place_desc_q: Place/Distribution: How will customers access your service?
promotion_desc_q: Promotion: How will you communicate with customers?
people_desc_q: People: Who delivers your service? What training and values?
process_desc_q: Process: Step-by-step procedures from inquiry to delivery?
physical_evidence_desc_q: Physical Evidence: What tangible elements support your service?
assumptions_q: Which assumptions must you specify before building financial projections? (Select all that apply)
irc_rate_q: Corporate Income Tax rate (IRC) – your value and source
revenue_approach_q: Which approach did the Sentydos report use to project revenues?
revenue_table_q: Calculate your maximum service capacity (table with service types, price, hours, weeks, utilization rates)
utilization_rates_q: Utilization/occupancy rates for Years 1 through 5 with justification
expense_categories_q: Which expense categories are considered 'External Supplies' (FSE)? (Select all that apply)
fixed_variable_table_q: Classify each expense category as FIXED or VARIABLE and provide amounts
personnel_table_q: Calculate your personnel costs (table with positions, salaries, SS, total)
investment_categories_q: Your initial investment should be broken down into which categories?
investment_budget_q: Create your investment budget table (tangible + intangible assets)
wacc_formula_q: What is the Weighted Average Cost of Capital (WACC) formula?
aftertax_kd_q: After-tax Kd = Pre-tax rate × (1 - Tax rate)
negative_wc_meaning_q: What does a NEGATIVE working capital requirement indicate?
wc_needs_q: Total Cyclic Needs (safety cash + receivables + inventory)
income_statement_q: Project your Income Statement for Years 1-5 (Revenue, Expenses, EBITDA, EBIT, PBT, Net Income)
fcff_formula_q: Which is the correct formula for Free Cash Flow to the Firm (FCFF)?
cashflow_table_q: Calculate Free Cash Flows using the indirect method (Year 0 to 5)
contribution_margin_q: Contribution Margin Ratio = 1 - Variable Cost Ratio
breakeven_revenue_q: Break-Even Revenue = Fixed Costs / Contribution Margin Ratio
ratio_matches_q: Match each ratio to its correct formula
ratios_table_q: Calculate your key financial ratios for Years 1-5 (Net Profit Margin, ROA, ROE, Asset Turnover, Financial Autonomy, Solvency, Current Ratio)
npv_true_q: Which statement about Net Present Value (NPV) is TRUE?
npv_table_q: Calculate NPV (table with FCF, discount factor, present value)
terminal_growth_q: Sustainable growth rate (g) for terminal value
risk_sensitivity_vars_q: Which TWO variables are most critical for sensitivity analysis?
base_case_q: Base case: Revenue, External Supplies, NPV, IRR, Payback
pessimistic_viable_q: Is the project still viable in pessimistic scenario? Contingency plans?
accounting_equation_q: Which accounting equation must always balance?
balance_sheet_q: Project your Balance Sheet for Years 1-5 (Assets, Equity, Liabilities)
bsc_perspectives_q: The Balanced Scorecard translates strategy into action across which FOUR perspectives?
bsc_table_q: Complete the BSC table: Strategic Objective, Indicator, Target, Initiative for each perspective
activity_plan_q: Create a monthly activity timeline for your first 6 months (Month, Key Activities, Deliverables, Responsible Person)
critical_factors_q: What are the THREE most critical success factors? For each: measurement, target, contingency plan.
checklist_items_q: Final checklist – verify all components are completed
final_risk_q: Single biggest risk to your business venture? Actions in first 90 days? How will you measure mitigation?
